title: Add Console planning-mode Plexus tool policy
description: Add a hard planning-mode allowlist for execute_tactus, persist Console mode on sessions/messages, and add report read APIs plus planning-mode exceptions for score contradictions and named report helpers.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started implementation. Backend first: central execute_tactus policy gate in MCP/tools/tactus_runtime/execute.py, then console mode propagation from session/message metadata, then narrow frontend toggle wiring. Planning mode will be a hard per-method allowlist, with explicit allowances for plexus.score.contradictions, plexus.report.acceptance_rate, and plexus.report.score_champion_version_timeline while keeping generic plexus.report.run blocked.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented planning-mode tool policy and Console action menu. Runtime now enforces planning access at the Plexus dispatcher, keeps api.list/helpers fully visible, adds report.list/info/blocks read APIs, propagates Console message/session mode into execute_tactus, and adds the composer + menu with Plan and Private switches. Validation passed: execute_tactus runtime tests, Console chat runtime tests, builtin procedure/MCP transport tests, targeted conversation-viewer Jest test, and dashboard typecheck.
